name: Autopsy
description: Graphical digital-forensics platform built on The Sleuth Kit. Tool: https://www.autopsy.com. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #94 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Autopsy output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Autopsy output file to parse instead of running it live.
